A
Dashboard AccessAdmin Mode

Dashboard

Bulk Upload Content

Upload a CSV file to create multiple blog posts or pages at once.

Select CSV File

Your CSV must include columns for title, content, type (BLOG/PAGE), and optionally publishAt.

CSV Format Guide

Ensure your CSV file contains the following exact column headers:

  • title (Required)
  • content (Required) - HTML allowed
  • type (Required) - "BLOG" or "PAGE"
  • slug (Optional)
  • published (Optional) - "TRUE" or "FALSE"
  • publishAt (Optional) - ISO Date e.g. "2026-06-05T10:00"
  • seoTitle (Optional)
  • seoDesc (Optional)
